reviews.review_msg: Took her in Albt.  Ok but not the best.  I couldn't understand her english.

She was a good professor in that she covered the materials in class but a terrible prof in general.  She picks favorites and she is biased.  SFU should do some background check on their "guest" professors and check up on them to see if they're doing a good job! If there are more profs like her, I am definitely transferring to a different university

I have never attended SFU, but I did take classes from Dr Schapansky at UofA and I thought she was wonderful.  Her subject area (semantics) is HARD-- deal with it!  If I ever had problems, she was always very helpful if I went to her office for help. I think most of these reviews are unfairly harsh.  She's a wonderful professor and very sweet.

She is horrible. She is not only difficult to understand, but her exams are just as incomprehensible. Her questions are so vague but she looks for such specific answers! Her grading methods are disgusting, honestly. She says you can "justify answers" but it's really just to waste time. And, I'm sure it's been mentioned: VOICE IS ANNOYING! Bad prof!

She was my nightmare during the summer! Her strong accent made everything not understandable. Worst of all, she didn't respect her students at all. She made mistakes on grading my two midterms and refused to change when I talked to her in person, which made me very mad. DONT WASTE YOUR TIME AND MONEY! There are tons of electives you can choose.

Horrible Horrible Prof.  When you ask for clarification on a certain concept through email, she does not bother responding at all.  She gives study guides for you to study and a final review, but the answers from both the study and review sometimes differ even if its the same question.  Accuracy is clearly not her strong point.

She is a terrible professor.  She is strict (which is great) but she is so stuck in the 20s that it's terrible.  Either she likes you or hates you.  I know she is only a "guest professor" but she shouldn't slack off because she's in a different country.  Just thinking about her makes me want to throw up.

Covers materials well but like what everyone says, she picks favorites.  I absolutely hate her and she reminds me of a witch.  Just seeing her makes your skin crawl.  One of the worst profs I ever had in my life.

She is a very nice woman, with a lot of patience for those who speak out and/or outwardly make inappropriate comments. However, her notes are directly from the book, are posted on WebCT AND the lectures were taped...little reason to show up to class.I was one of the few who didn't make a habit of skipping. Many complained about her heavy accent.

She is hard to understand and therefore hard to follow in lecture. Her lecture notes are decent, but her explanation of the material sucks. She definitely chooses favourites and she can be rude. I hate her as a person and loathe her as a prof
